name: Nexon Open API
description: Nexon Open API exposes MapleStory, Dungeon Fighter and other Nexon game data for third-party developers.

seo.title: Nexon Open API — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Nexon Open API: Nexon Open API exposes MapleStory, Dungeon Fighter and other Nexon game data for third-party developers.

when_to_use: Accessing Nexon game data APIs for player analytics integrations
Building game companion apps with Nexon's public player data
Running player behavior analysis for gaming community platforms

pros: Free public access to MapleStory and DFO data
RESTful endpoints with character and ranking data
Enables community tools and analytics sites
cons: Data restricted to Nexon-owned titles only
API changes often break third-party tools
review.verdict: Useful for fan tools and MapleStory analytics, but not a general-purpose game-data platform for any studio.
review.best_for: Fan community developers building MapleStory or DFO tools
review.not_for: Studios needing multi-publisher game data or real-time telemetry
